name: ultisim-dto
description: UltiSim Digital Twin of the Organization (DTO) — DLA26BZ03-NV011. Canonical POC is the dependency-free build in standalone/.

scripts.note: Open standalone/dto-dashboard.html directly, or run `npm start` and visit http://localhost:8000/dto-dashboard.html. The legacy Croquet Microverse world (index.html + lib/) no longer connects; see docs/DTO_Solution_Design.md.
